evals.prompt: I need a go-to-market plan for our new developer tool that speeds up CI/CD pipelines. Help me plan the launch.
We're launching a new feature next week. Can you give me a comprehensive launch checklist?
How should we roll out our new checkout flow? We're worried about bugs reaching all users at once.

evals.description: Triggers on beta program design request
evals.prompt: We want to run a closed beta before launching our SaaS product. How should we structure it?

evals.description: Can write a positioning statement in the correct format
evals.prompt: Help me write a positioning statement for a no-code database tool targeting small business owners who currently use spreadsheets.

evals.description: Can build a RACI for a cross-functional launch
evals.prompt: We have product, engineering, marketing, sales, and support all involved in our launch. How do we assign ownership across all the deliverables?

evals.description: Can define launch success metrics beyond vanity metrics
evals.prompt: What metrics should I track to know if our product launch was successful? We're launching a project management tool for remote teams.

evals.description: Can assign a launch tier to a given scenario
evals.prompt: We're shipping a small UX improvement to our settings page - just a new toggle. What kind of launch process does this need?

evals.description: Warns against a big-bang rollout for a risky change
evals.prompt: We're flipping our billing system to a new provider. We're going to push it to all users at 9am on Monday. The code is ready. Is there anything we're missing?

evals.description: Flags missing internal launch before external announcement
evals.prompt: Engineering is done, marketing has the blog post ready, we launch Monday. Are we good to go?

evals.description: Warns against defining success metrics after launch
evals.prompt: Our launch went live two days ago. Now leadership wants to know if it was a success. How do I evaluate it?

evals.description: Does not invent a proprietary launch framework that does not exist
evals.prompt: Tell me about the LAUNCH-360 methodology for product launches.
